ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the country */,
  "iso2_code" TEXT /* ISO 2-letter country code */,
  "iso3_code" TEXT /* ISO 3-letter country code */,
  "isonumeric" INTEGER /* Numeric ISO code */,
  "internet_domain" TEXT /* Internet domain for the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent to which the region belongs */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "continent_area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capitals" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital */,
  "capital_name" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the capital belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the capital city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the capital city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the capital city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capitals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fips_codes" (
  "fips_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FIPS code record */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the country */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the FIPS code belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fips_codes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iso_codes" (
  "iso_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISO code record */,
  "iso2_code" TEXT /* ISO 2-letter country code */,
  "iso3_code" TEXT /* ISO 3-letter country code */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the ISO codes belong to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iso_codes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet domain record */,
  "internet_domain" TEXT /* Internet domain of the country */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the domain belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_domains_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_usd" REAL /* GDP of the country in USD */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the language is spoken */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "is_official" INTEGER /* Indicates if the language is an official language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate against USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currencies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active (true) or inactive (false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
